mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT m.perms FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id INNER JOIN sys_role r ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE m.status = 1 AND m.deleted = 0 AND r.status = 1 AND r.deleted = 0 AND ur.user_id = #{userId} AND rm.half_check = 0 AND m.perms IS NOT NULL AND m.perms != '' UNION SELECT DISTINCT m.perms FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_user_menu um ON m.id = um.menu_id WHERE m.status = 1 AND m.deleted = 0 AND um.user_id = #{userId} AND um.half_check = 0 AND m.perms IS NOT NULL AND m.perms != ''

SELECT DISTINCT m.id, m.parent_id, m.menu_name, m.path, m.component, m.visible, m.status, IFNULL(m.perms, '') AS perms, m.is_frame, m.menu_type, m.icon, m.sort, m.create_time FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id INNER JOIN sys_role r ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE m.menu_type IN ('M', 'C') AND m.status = 1 AND m.deleted = 0 AND r.status = 1 AND r.deleted = 0 AND ur.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY m.parent_id, m.sort
